title: WEATHER 2 REMASTERED RP ENCHANCED
description: THIS PROJECT WILL BE ABOUT WEATHER 2 REMASTERED BUT ITS 3D AND THE CLOUDS WILL BE SMOOTH.
body:
### WHO ARE YOU?

I am XFATEX the person that made the 3D protomanlys weather mod blocks (I will link it down in the descritpion) and I was wondering that weather 2 remastered has alot of blocks and you can change the cloud texture so I gave it a try and it seems that it works perfectly well and the clouds look amazing in the game and the rain looks good but I will change it soon dont worry.

**https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pmweather-resource-pack**

HERE IS THE CONFIG TO MAKE THE CLOUDS AS THE SAM AS MINE

**https://www.mediafire.com/folder/ngqqkrnyjo2l0/weather2R_config**
